task_completion.description: Agent uses Firefox to search for astronomical data for Tucson, AZ on December 13, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Firefox open and navigating to astronomical websites (e.g., timeanddate.com, moongiant.com, etc.) with queries related to Tucson, AZ and the date Dec 13, 2024.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Astronomy Tools'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Firefox Bookmark Library, sidebar, or menu with a folder explicitly named 'Astronomy Tools'.

task_completion.description: Agent adds at least two bookmarks to the 'Astronomy Tools' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of the 'Astronomy Tools' bookmark folder containing at least two saved web pages.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a file named 'stargazing_plan.json' in the '~/Documents/' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor, IDE, or terminal saving or displaying a file specifically named 'stargazing_plan.json' located in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: The JSON file contains all required keys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the JSON file contents showing the exact keys: 'location', 'date', 'sunset', 'astronomical_twilight_end', 'moon_illumination_percent', 'moon_set_time', 'jupiter_rise_time', and 'geminids_zhr'.

task_completion.description: The JSON file contains accurate values based on the collected data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the JSON file contents showing location as Tucson (or Tucson, AZ), date as December 13, 2024, moon illumination around 96-98%, Geminids ZHR around 120-160, and sunset around 18:51.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the Firefox browser to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual rendered web pages in Firefox rather than the agent hallucinating the data or using a Python script/curl to fetch data without opening the browser.

integrity.description: Agent used the Firefox GUI to create bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the Firefox bookmark star icon, bookmark manager (Library), or context menus, rather than terminal commands modifying Firefox SQLite databases directly.

integrity.description: Agent saved the JSON file to the disk rather than just printing the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor save action, a terminal command like 'echo > ~/Documents/stargazing_plan.json', or a file explorer showing the file exists, rather than just a JSON string printed to the standard output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: For Tucson, Arizona on December 13, 2024: Sunset was approximately 18:51. Moon illumination was 96-98%. Geminids meteor shower ZHR (Zenith Hourly Rate) was 120-160. Accept values within or very close to these ranges. Note: Some sources might incorrectly claim sunset at 17:15-17:30, but the verified time is ~18:51.
